title: selaginella hispida
intro: Selaginella hispida, also known as the hairy spike moss, is a type of small, evergreen plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Selaginella hispida include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Selaginella hispida is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
